title: Intrepid (disambiguation)
content:
'''Intrepid''' may refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*The '''''[[Intrepid (Vaneer)|Intrepid]]'''''
*The '''''[[Intrepid Heart]]''''', a [[GX1 short hauler]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Intrepid (luxury cruiser)|''Intrepid'']]''', a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] luxury [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]]
*'''[[Intrepid (CR90 corvette)|''Intrepid'']]''', a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]
*'''[[Intrepid (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|''Intrepid'']]''', a [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] of the New Republic Defense Fleet
*'''[[Intrepid (Endurance-class)|''Intrepid'']]''', an [[Endurance-class fleet carrier|''Endurance''-class fleet carrier]] of the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]]
*'''[[Intrepid (Imperial I-class)|''Intrepid'']]''', an [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] of the Imperial Starfleet
*'''[[Intrepid (Munifex-class)|''Intrepid'']]''', a [[Munifex-class light cruiser|''Munifex''-class]] (aka "Class 1000") light cruiser of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]
*'''[[Intrepid (Unknown Regions)|''Intrepid'']]''', an Imperial ship that served the [[Fel Empire]] during a mission to the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]]
*'''[[Intrepid (Venator-class)|''Intrepid'']]''', a [[Venator-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Venator''-class Star Destroyer]] of the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]]

==Real world==
*'''Intrepid''', a ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'' server

|de=Intrepid
}}
